problem: Patients managing multiple medications face confusion with different refill dates, complex dosing schedules, and time-consuming pharmacy visits. This leads to missed doses, medication errors, and poor adherence.
solution: Full-service pharmacy that delivers pre-sorted medication packets organized by time of day. Automatic refill management, direct coordination with doctors and insurance, and consolidated billing. Simplifies complex medication regimens into convenient, pre-organized doses delivered to patients' doors.
